name: Lemon Asparagus and Carrots
recipeInstructions:
PER SERVING: 26 cal., 1g Pro., 6g Carbo., 0g fat, 0mg Chol., 19mg Sodium
Wash and trim the small carrots. Place carrots in a steamer basket above boiling water. Cover and steam for about 15 minutes or until crisp-tender. Drain the carrots.
Meanwhile, cook the frozen asparagus spears according to package instructions. Rinse the asparagus in cold water; drain.
Cover and chill the drained carrots and asparagus. To serve, arrange the carrots and asparagus on a platter. Sprinkle with a little lemon juice and lemon pepper.
